creator: net@arrishq.net
text:
Hi,

I've attached 2 patches I'm personally using for a long long time already (both created back in may this year).

Both should apply without any problems and update both the port itself, as well as the i18n port to version 2.40.

For getting it compiled, please manually remove the following files from www/seamonkey/files/

patch-1194520
patch-bug847568
patch-bug991253
patch-media_libav_config__unix.h
patch-z-bug517422

I'm unsure if these are still required.

Please note that's a private test patch that is NOT intended for production / daily use. Even if - for me - everything works as expected, there's no guarantee it works for someone else too.

Local test environment: FreeBSD 10.2 / 10.3 - both amd64 and i386
